message:
fix(fsfs,fusion,embed): fsync all production metadata writes

Replace fs::write() with write_all + sync_all in 8 production code
paths across three crates to prevent silent data loss on power failure:

  fsfs/runtime.rs (6 sites):
  - write_index_artifacts: vector & lexical manifest JSON
  - write_index_sentinel: index sentinel JSON
  - write_version_cache: version check cache JSON
  - write_rollback_manifest: rollback manifest JSON
  - save_explain_session: explain session JSON

  fusion/cache.rs (1 site):
  - IndexSentinel::write_to: staleness-detection sentinel

  embed/model_manifest.rs (1 site):
  - write_verification_marker: model verification cache

Without fsync these writes could appear successful but lose data if
the kernel hasn't flushed pages to disk before a crash.

Bead: bd-1l6x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
